comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Microloom (2-knob, v1 shimmer-cloud core). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 7-knob desktop-preview manifest. Octave (+1), grain size, base delay, and shimmer amount are baked in microloom.c.
gid_comment: 0x08 = Delay -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DLY_, matching Fx_DLY_Microlm.
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
